ai_features_disclosed.description: Vision-language model extracts structured fields (name, date of birth, document number, address) from scanned identity documents uploaded via HTTPS API. Returns JSON. Used in customer onboarding KYC flow.

Classifies uploaded loan-application documents (pay stub, bank statement, tax return, employment letter) and extracts relevant financial fields. Output feeds into the human underwriter's review queue.
When the model's per-field extraction confidence falls below a configurable threshold, the document is flagged for manual review rather than auto-processed.

training_data_sources: Vendor's proprietary synthetic financial documents (no real customer data)

categories: Document image content (which may include other PII)
pii_processing_claims.handling_notes: Documents retained for 7 days for retry/replay then purged. Embeddings retained for 30 days for model improvement only if the customer opts in (default: opt-out). No PII used for cross-customer training. OpenAI fallback API calls send only the low-confidence document region with PII redaction applied where the model's first-pass extraction identified PII fields.

data_residency.conditions: Primary processing in AWS us-east-1 (Virginia). Canadian customer data optionally pinned to ca-central-1 under enterprise tier (deploying organization is on enterprise tier). Cross-border transfer to US Anthropic and OpenAI APIs governed by contractual data-localization clauses and customer's recorded consent.

vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.name: OpenAI Inc.
vendor_disclosed_subprocessors.role: Fallback OCR API for low-confidence vision-model output
